bug_report.summary: Typewriter Mode no longer keeps caret line vertically centered after clicking/placing caret (viewport shifts to show different content position)
steps_to_reproduce: Open the Markdown editor and load the Navigation Fixture content.
Click on the line “START_MARKER_E (click this line)” to place the caret there.
Click again on the START_MARKER_E line (e.g., near the end of the line) while Typewriter Mode is still enabled.
expected_behaviors: With Typewriter Mode enabled, placing/moving the caret should keep the caret line vertically centered (or as close as possible) without changing to a noticeably different viewport position.
actual_behaviors: After the code change, the lower-right editor/preview pane shows a different scroll offset/viewport position after the click: the document content (heading/lines) is positioned differently and the caret line is not kept at the same centered position as in the before-change build.
